case_title: MICHAEL CHISEK VS. WILLIAM KNIGHTS, LLC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,817.00 FILED BY CHISEK, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM KNIGHTS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
